/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++14 -O3 -std=c++14 -pthread -std=c++0x -std=c++14 -fexceptions -fopenmp  -O3 -DNDEBUG   -shared -Wl,-soname,fast_lio_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.cpython-38-aarch64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/fast_lio/fast_lio_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.cpython-38-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/fast_lio__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/fast_lio/_fast_lio_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jetson/slash_ws/build/fast_lio/rosidl_generator_py/fast_lio:/home/jetson/slash_ws/build/fast_lio:/opt/ros/foxy/lib rosidl_generator_py/fast_lio/libfast_lio__python.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.9.so libfast_lio__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libfast_lio__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so libfast_lio__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libfast_lio__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/libfastrtps.so.2.1.4 /opt/ros/foxy/lib/libfoonathan_memory-0.7.1.a -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libtinyxml2.so -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libtinyxml2.so -ldl /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lrt /opt/ros/foxy/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.13
